parameters.query:
SELECT
  current.project_name,
  current.keyword,
  current.current_position AS current_pos,
  current.url_ranking,
  old.current_position AS pos_90_days_ago,
  (old.current_position - current.current_position) AS position_drop,
  current.search_volume
FROM keyword_rankings current
JOIN keyword_rankings old ON (
  old.project_name = current.project_name
  AND old.keyword = current.keyword
  AND old.recorded_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '97 days' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '83 days'
)
WHERE current.recorded_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND (old.current_position - current.current_position) >= 5
ORDER BY position_drop DESC
LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO seo_opportunities (project_name, opportunity_type, description, estimated_impact, effort_level, status)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.projectName }}',
  'content_refresh',
  'Keyword "{{ $json.keyword }}" dropped {{ $json.positionDrop }} positions — refresh needed for: ' || rec->>'action',
  'Recover to position ' || {{ $json.currentPos - $json.positionDrop }},
  rec->>'priority',
  'open'
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.recommendations) }}'::jsonb) AS rec;
